name: Instagram: Post Like
description: Like or unlike one Instagram post, reel, or IGTV URL. Idempotent: if the post is already in the target state the workflow returns status=already_liked or status=already_unliked without re-clicking. Use action=like (default) to add a like, action=unlike to remove a prior like. Do not use this for bulk liking — Instagram rate-limits rapid liking from a single session.

help.summary: Like or unlike one Instagram post. Idempotent.

parameters.name: post_url
parameters.description: Full Instagram post, reel, or tv URL.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: like taps the Like heart if the post is not already liked. unlike taps it if the post is currently liked. Defaults to like.

examples.description: Like a post (no-op if already liked)

help.returns: JSON with post_url, action, and status: one of liked | unliked | already_liked | already_unliked | login_required | not_found | action_bar_not_found | click_failed. Successful state transitions also return before_label and after_label for triage.
notes: Requires a logged-in Instagram session in the active Chrome profile; returns status=login_required if signed out.
Opens a dedicated workflow tab (use_current_tab=false), so this workflow is safe to run in parallel with other dedicated-tab instagram flows.

The post action bar is resolved by walking up from the unique 'Comment' SVG in the article and finding the sibling Like/Unlike SVG — robust against class-name churn but assumes Instagram keeps the single shared action bar layout.
Rate limiting is an Instagram-side concern: don't loop faster than a real user would. Space batched likes with a real delay between calls.

browser_automation.description: Opens a dedicated workflow tab, navigates to one post, waits for hydration, and flips (or confirms) the Like state with a single click when the current state doesn't match the requested action.

sequences.name: instagram_post_like
sequences.description: Toggle the Like state of one post to match action, idempotent.

required_variables.name: post_url
required_variables.description: Full Instagram post or reel URL

steps.name: Allow the post page to settle
Allow the post page extra time to hydrate
Toggle Like if current state does not match the requested action
